title: Chris Satae
extract:
Tēvita Chris Satae (Tongan: Tēvita Kulisi Satae) (born 22 October 1992), anglicised David Chris Satae is a Tongan rugby league footballer who plays as a prop or second-row forward for the Catalans Dragons in the Super League.
Satae played for the New Zealand Warriors in the National Rugby League. He has previously played for Hull F.C. in the Super League.
